case_title: PLUMSTEAD ARTHUR VS GERMAN MOTORS CORP.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GERMAN MOTORS CORP.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,741.41 FILED BY PLUMSTEAD ARTHUR AS TO DEFENDANT GERMAN MOTORS CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-13-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
